votes.rationale: Motion-0031 successfully proved the second live execution slice. A builder-capable execution agent claimed a queue-backed packet, emitted debug.patch evidence, completed the builder stage, and routed the packet to VERIFIER.

The motion remained appropriately scoped. It extended the governed runtime proof by one lane, preserved operator-governed assignment, and demonstrated explicit verifier handoff without introducing premature auto-handoff behavior.

The motion is coherent, bounded, and successfully implemented. Required live evidence exists: WORK_CLAIMED, debug.patch, WORK_COMPLETED, and WORK_ROUTED to VERIFIER. The packet UI also reflects builder complete and verifier ready.
